name: prometheus
explanation: This is the user-supplied Generic Prometheus check (`GenericPrometheusCheck`). It is not tied to any single upstream system: the user must point it at an arbitrary application's Prometheus endpoint, choose a metric `namespace`, and explicitly enumerate the `metrics` to scrape (with optional renaming). None of these can be inferred from the wire — the URL, namespace, and metric allow-list are inherently per-application configuration decisions. There is no canonical port, path, or service to probe.
notes: Method is `other` (not `credentials-required`) because the blocker is user-defined semantics (namespace, metric allow-list), not authentication. There is no auto_conf.yaml — Autodiscovery for arbitrary Prometheus endpoints is intentionally not provided here; users are pointed at the OpenMetrics integration instead.
